name: xauusd_trend_pullback_bb_m15
hypothesis: Prior generation showed XAUUSD M15 is trend-persistent during LDN/NY overlap, defeating pure mean-reversion. Instead, use Bollinger Band middle-line pullbacks in a confirmed trend (EMA stack + ADX) to harvest trend continuation while entering at favorable pullback prices.

regime_filter.description: Only engage when ADX confirms trend and ATR shows participative volatility.

entry_rules.long: EMA50 > EMA200; price pulls back to touch BB middle (SMA20) or lower half but does NOT close below lower BB; next bar closes above BB middle; RSI(14) between 40 and 65 (not overbought).
entry_rules.short: Mirror: EMA50 < EMA200; pullback to BB middle from below without closing above upper BB; next bar closes below BB middle; RSI(14) between 35 and 60.

exit_rules.time_stop: Close after 20 bars (5 hours) if neither hit
exit_rules.trailing: After +1R favorable, move SL to breakeven + 0.1*ATR; after +1.5R, trail 1.2*ATR behind close
